problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site may resolve What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue? by blocking at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
